name: systeme
description: Reads Systeme.io contacts, tags, contact fields, funnels, and funnel steps, and writes contact/tag/contact-field/funnel lifecycle mutations and contact-tag assignment, through the Systeme.io public API.

risk.read: external Systeme.io API read of contact, tag, funnel, and funnel-step data
risk.write: external Systeme.io API mutation (contact/tag/contact-field/funnel lifecycle, contact-tag assignment)
risk.approval: reverse ETL plan approval required before writes
